headline: UGI Q2 Earnings & Revenues Lag Estimates, Sales Increase Y/Y
summary: UGI misses Q2 earnings and revenue estimates despite higher sales, raises fiscal 2026 guidance and expands gas infrastructure plans.

headline: MDU Resources Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
summary: MDU misses Q1 earnings and revenue estimates as sales fall year over year, while higher interest costs pressure results.
